scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/api run lint
scripts.postinstall: cd apps/api && npx prisma generate && cd ../.. && npx esbuild apps/api/src/serverless.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=api/index.js --external:@prisma/client --external:bcryptjs --format=cjs --bundle
